faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control services in New Hyde Park typically range from $350 to $2,000, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and whether interior and exterior treatments are needed. We provide free, no-obligation inspections and quotes for all New Hyde Park residents.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants or regular ants?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are much larger than common household ants (up to 5/8 inch long) and are typically black or dark brown. You may notice sawdust-like wood shavings near baseboards or windowsills, hear rustling sounds inside walls, or see large winged ants in spring. Our technicians can quickly identify the species during your inspection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you get to my New Hyde Park home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for New Hyde Park and surrounding Long Island communities. Carpenter ant problems require prompt attention to prevent further damage, so we prioritize emergency calls and work around your schedule to provide convenient appointment times.

faqs.question: Are your carpenter ant treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We'll provide clear instructions on any brief precautions needed during treatment, and most applications allow you to return to normal activities within a few hours.
